{{Infobox location
| name = Silver District
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Silver District]] is one of the districts in [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Wisdom is the virtue necessary in the [[Silver District]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Silver District]]'s light appears as silver shards drifting on the wind.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver District]] has reported disrespect.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“The Silver District has reported disrespect,” the dog’s growling voice said.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
